allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const code=fs.readFileSync\('c:/Users/PC/Desktop/Web CV DR/index.html','utf8'\); const m=code.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\); let ok=true; if\(m\){m.forEach\(\(s,i\)=>{try{new Function\(s.replace\(/<\\/?script[^>]*>/g,''\)\);} catch\(e\){console.log\('Script block',i,':',e.message.slice\(0,120\)\);ok=false;}}\);} if\(ok\)console.log\('JS OK'\);")
